Anti_aspect_ratio_master: Creates an empty latent with Flux, Z-Image, and ERNIE-oriented presets plus manual or image-derived dimensions.
Antimatter_TextFileAppender: Saves text to TXT or JSON with append mode and scene-aware replacement for manual rework workflows.
Batch_Loader_From_Folder: Loads image batches directly from a local folder with random, sequential, freeze, skip, preview, and move-to-processed controls.
LinePrompt_MasterLoad: Loads prompt lines from TXT files with sequential, random, reverse, freeze, prefix, delimiter, preview, and style-folder controls.
LinePrompt_MasterLoad_JSON: Loads scene prompts from JSON files with sequential or manual scene selection and a Scene Name output for file naming.
